scripts.dev:angular: npm run generate:angular && cross-env PLATFORM=Angular astro dev --port 4331
scripts.dev:react: npm run generate:react && cross-env PLATFORM=React astro dev --port 4332
scripts.dev:webcomponents: npm run generate:webcomponents && cross-env PLATFORM=WebComponents astro dev --port 4333
scripts.dev:blazor: npm run generate:blazor && cross-env PLATFORM=Blazor astro dev --port 4334
scripts.dev:angular:jp: npm run generate:angular:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=Angular astro dev --port 4331
scripts.dev:react:jp: npm run generate:react:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=React astro dev --port 4332
scripts.dev:webcomponents:jp: npm run generate:webcomponents:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=WebComponents astro dev --port 4333
scripts.dev:blazor:jp: npm run generate:blazor:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=Blazor astro dev --port 4334
scripts.build:angular: npm run generate:angular && cross-env PLATFORM=Angular NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build:react: npm run generate:react && cross-env PLATFORM=React NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir=../../dist/react

scripts.build:blazor: npm run generate:blazor && cross-env PLATFORM=Blazor NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir=../../dist/blazor

scripts.build:react:jp: npm run generate:react:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=React NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir=../../dist/react-jp
scripts.build:webcomponents:jp: npm run generate:webcomponents:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=WebComponents NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir=../../dist/wc-jp
scripts.build:blazor:jp: npm run generate:blazor:jp && cross-env PLATFORM=Blazor NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir=../../dist/blazor-jp
